race.description: Tamburlaine Organic Wine Orange Gold Cup 17/04 Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: JEWEL COUNTY (13) shed her Maiden status in good style here two-back with a solid Maiden win over the 1300m. Closed late in a much stronger contest with a narrow fifth over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Ideally placed today and is sure to run well. MRS BULL (2) has been good in finishing fourth in both runs since a spell. Should be at peak fitness now and draws well so could break through. SHYAMALAN (8) was only 2.5L off the winner at Goulburn last start. A repeat of that performance would stack up nicely here. SHADDAP (6) is also in the mix.
